title: Les fluides thermochimiques dans l'agriculture d'intérieur
subtitle: MANUEL DE FORMATION
description: A training manual for the Horizon 2020 TheGreefa project introducing the concept, applications, and demonstration of thermochemical fluid technology for climate control and energy storage in greenhouse farming. It details system components, demonstrator sites in Switzerland and Tunisia, case study simulations in Spain and Italy, environmental and techno-economic impact assessments, and policy recommendations.
